row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a road with construction barriers on the right.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Vehicles ahead maintain forward trajectories; static objects (barriers, buildings) remain fixed relative to ego.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban driving scene under overcast sky. Road is flanked by concrete barriers and chain-link fencing enclosing a construction zone on the right. Multiple vehicles are visible ahead in adjacent lanes. A large modern building with curved architecture is on the left.
semantic.visibility_notes: All key objects are clearly visible with no significant occlusion or distortion. Scene structure is coherent and stable.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of ego vehicle. Vehicles ahead move consistently without abrupt jumps or disappearances. Barriers and fences remain structurally continuous across frames.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain presence and relative positions. No sudden appearance/disappearance of objects. Trajectories appear physically plausible.
logical.structure_continuity: Road layout, barriers, and background buildings remain consistent. No warping, flickering, or structural drift observed.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily within its lane, maintaining safe distance from adjacent vehicles.
decision.risk_context: No immediate risk detected. Construction zone is separated by barriers. Traffic flow appears orderly. No emergency maneuver required.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban driving scene but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and structural fidelity. Vehicles and barriers are present but exhibit blurring and artifacting. Building details are less defined.
semantic.visibility_notes: Key objects are degraded — blurred, duplicated, or partially missing. Structural elements like fences and barriers show instability. Some objects appear ghosted or smeared.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Motion appears generally smooth but with intermittent jitter and frame-to-frame inconsistency. Objects may flicker or shift position unnaturally. Temporal coherence is reduced compared to Row 1.
logical.object_continuity: Some vehicles vanish or reappear inconsistently. Barriers and fences show discontinuities — segments may disappear or warp between frames. Object boundaries are unstable.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure and background elements exhibit warping and drifting. Fences and barriers do not maintain rigid geometry. Overall scene stability is compromised.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle appears to continue forward, but trajectory may be slightly erratic due to visual artifacts affecting perception.
decision.risk_context: Scene readability is significantly reduced. Degraded visibility of barriers, lane markings, and other vehicles may impair downstream decision-making. Potential for misinterpretation of spatial relationships.

artifacts_or_instabilities: loss of fine detail in all objects
